reviews.comment:
La estación de servicio YPF del automóvil Club Argentino es una de las pocas en la zona del centro, tiene muy buena atención, buenos precios, el shop tiene gran variedad de productos, baños públicos y estacionamiento porvado. Es muy fácil llegar.

(Translated by Google)
The Argentine Automobile Club's YPF service station is one of the few in the downtown area. It offers excellent service, good prices, a wide variety of products, public restrooms, and private parking. It's very easy to get to.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11217960365668624520/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNjMjR1Z1VBEAE

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)

(Translated by Google)
Good service, fast, spacious waiting area, clean and spacious restrooms, and a place to eat and have good coffee or a variety of options.
